_comment: LAT-2839 — EN ui_strings-overlay voor de component-literals die op /en/ nog NL toonden: de Langhe lead-magnet (LangheCaptureBlock), de route-infographic (RouteItineraryDays) en de kaart-chrome + config-labels (RhoneMap). Zonder deze values valt t() terug op de NL-default en staat er op /en/ Nederlands. CONCEPT-EN: door de CTO opgesteld, nog NIET door de Lead Editor vastgesteld (governance R1, LAT-2570) — de tekst hieronder mag door redactie herschreven worden voordat/na de seed. Geen em-dashes gebruikt (LAT-2570 regel 8). Seeden met: DIRECTUS_URL=... DIRECTUS_TOKEN=... node directus/scripts/seed-ui-strings-en.mjs directus/data/ui-strings-en-lat2839.json
langhe.capture.a.koptekst: The full trip planner as a PDF
langhe.capture.a.body: This article gives you the essentials. If you actually drive the route, there is more: phone numbers for the wineries, opening hours per season, and an overview of what each day costs. It is all in the compact Langhe PDF that I send to everyone who signs up for The Brief.
langhe.capture.a.subCopy: Every two weeks you also receive The Brief: on wine, travel and the people behind it. You can unsubscribe at any time.
langhe.capture.c.body: If you want to know where to begin in the Langhe: I wrote a compact trip planner. Route, wineries, hotels, budget. Sign up for The Brief and it is yours right away.
langhe.capture.c.subCopy: Every two weeks The Brief follows: on wine and travel from first-hand experience.
route.itinerary.totalPre: Total driving time on the route: around
rhone.map.label: Map
rhone.caption.10-wijnhuizen-rhone-benchm: The ten Rhone appellations on the map
rhone.title.van-macon-naar-aix-rhone-rou: From Mâcon to Aix: the route
